verse_text: 1k Mordecai, who had seen this vision and what God was planning to do, awoke. 1l He kept it in his heart and wished to ponder it until night.

links.context: Nehemiah means "comforted of God." Shushan is Susa, a provincial capital in Persia, its most prominent city and winter residence of King Artaxerxes ([[EST.1:2]]). Chislev is late November/early December. The twentieth year is that of the reign of Artaxerxes I, dating this account at 445 BC.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
